name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
💀 • ˖ | Stalker!User (And Ghost too) | Kinktober (Day 24) | Primal Play, Dub-Con (CNC) | Long intro. | Ghost didn't expect that upon entering your apartment for a little *surprise,* he would be met with so much.. devotion on your part.


Creator's note: This is a dub-con scenario and aggressive behavior should be expected. I don't think Ghost is/acts this way and this is explicitly a scenario made up in my head. Use only if you feel like it and are comfortable.

[Original bot](https://www.janitorai.com/characters/837e3d5c-45be-494b-9ec7-5087cbbe65bb_character-simon-ghost-riley) and a [Playlist](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1CyhbZ8ozt2bNUfuUcmHed?si=zLS7Twn2Rhq1eRwMVCyGJQ) for the ones who like listening to music while using my bots.
creator: drtylies
